title: oSzoukaua's: Book o' Experience
description: Adds a craftable book that allows you to store and retrieve your XP levels!
body:
# Description: This pack adds a new **craftable book** that allows you to **store your XP** levels, and to later **retrieve them**!
**The Book can store levels from 0-30**
_It can be crafted like so:_ ![book crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c0768ebf2091bcdb426aa734ff5a8e7cee60a9a.png)
## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side



Due to a rounding error in the games code, it is possible to lose an incredibly tiny amount of a single point of XP when storing and retrieving XP from the book


## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
Discord @oSzoukaua
E-Mail Contact.oSzoukaua+Modrinth@gmail.com




Ko-Fi: ko-fi.com/oszoukaua Other: linktr.ee/oSzoukaua
